title: Refining LDL-C Targets in Very-High-Risk Patients
shortDescription: A practical review of the updated lipid guidance and how it changes treatment thresholds for high-risk patients.
fullDescription: This lecture walks through the updated LDL-C targets, the trial evidence behind them, and how to apply the guidance in routine practice for patients with established cardiovascular disease.

title: Understanding Type 2 Diabetes: A Guide for Patients
shortDescription: What Type 2 diabetes is, how it's diagnosed, and simple lifestyle changes that make a real difference.

title: Recognising Early Signs of Skin Cancer
shortDescription: The ABCDE rule for spotting suspicious moles, and when to see a specialist.

title: Migraine Management: Beyond Acute Treatment
shortDescription: A discussion on preventive migraine therapy options and patient selection criteria.
